title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, argues that ad-based monetization rather than subscriptions is the path forward for AI tools, and that the primary bottleneck for AI agents is human trust adoption rather than technical capability. He raised $26M by applying probabilistic decision-making frameworks from competitive sailing to startup investment strategy.
